title: Bump github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go from 2.19.0+incompatible to 2.20.0+incompatible
body:
Bumps [github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go](https://github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go) from 2.19.0+incompatible to 2.20.0+incompatible.
Release notes *Sourced from [github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go's releases](https://github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/releases).* > ## Release 2.20.0 > ## New Features > > - Allow all in-process spans of a trace to share sampling state ([#443](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/443)) -- Prithvi Raj > > Sampling state is shared between all spans of the trace that are still in memory. > This allows implementation of delayed sampling decisions (see below). > > - Support delayed sampling decisions ([#449](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/449)) -- Yuri Shkuro > > This is a large structural change to how the samplers work. > It allows some samplers to be executed multiple times on different > span events (like setting a tag) and make a positive sampling decision > later in the span life cycle, or even based on children spans. > See [README](https://github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/blob/HEAD/README.md#delayed-sampling) for more details. > > There is a related minor change in behavior of the adaptive (per-operation) sampler, > which will no longer re-sample the trace when `span.SetOperation()` is called, i.e. the > operation used to make the sampling decision is always the one provided at span creation. > > - Add experimental tag matching sampler ([#452](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/452)) -- Yuri Shkuro > > A sampler that can sample a trace based on a certain tag added to the root > span or one of its local (in-process) children. The sampler can be used with > another experimental `PrioritySampler` that allows multiple samplers to try > to make a sampling decision, in a certain priority order. > > - [log/zap] Report whether a trace was sampled ([#445](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/445)) -- Abhinav Gupta > - Allow config.FromEnv() to enrich an existing config object ([#436](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/436)) -- Vineeth Reddy > > ## Minor patches > > - Expose Sampler on Tracer and accept sampler options via Configuration ([#460](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/460)) -- Yuri Shkuro > - Fix github.com/uber-go/atomic import ([#464](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/464)) -- Yuri Shkuro > - Add nodejs to crossdock tests ([#441](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/441)) -- Bhavin Gandhi > - Bump Go compiler version to 1.13 ([#453](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/453)) -- Yuri Shkuro
Changelog *Sourced from [github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go's changelog](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md).* > Changes by Version > ================== > > 2.20.1 (unreleased) > ------------------- > > - Nothing yet. > > > 2.20.0 (2019-11-06) > ------------------- > > ## New Features > > - Allow all in-process spans of a trace to share sampling state ([#443](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/443)) -- Prithvi Raj > > Sampling state is shared between all spans of the trace that are still in memory. > This allows implementation of delayed sampling decisions (see below). > > - Support delayed sampling decisions ([#449](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/449)) -- Yuri Shkuro > > This is a large structural change to how the samplers work. > It allows some samplers to be executed multiple times on different > span events (like setting a tag) and make a positive sampling decision > later in the span life cycle, or even based on children spans. > See [README](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/blob/master/README.md#delayed-sampling) for more details. > > There is a related minor change in behavior of the adaptive (per-operation) sampler, > which will no longer re-sample the trace when `span.SetOperation()` is called, i.e. the > operation used to make the sampling decision is always the one provided at span creation. > > - Add experimental tag matching sampler ([#452](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/452)) -- Yuri Shkuro > > A sampler that can sample a trace based on a certain tag added to the root > span or one of its local (in-process) children. The sampler can be used with > another experimental `PrioritySampler` that allows multiple samplers to try > to make a sampling decision, in a certain priority order. > > - [log/zap] Report whether a trace was sampled ([#445](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/445)) -- Abhinav Gupta > - Allow config.FromEnv() to enrich an existing config object ([#436](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/436)) -- Vineeth Reddy > > ## Minor patches > > - Expose Sampler on Tracer and accept sampler options via Configuration ([#460](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/460)) -- Yuri Shkuro > - Fix github.com/uber-go/atomic import ([#464](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/464)) -- Yuri Shkuro > - Add nodejs to crossdock tests ([#441](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/441)) -- Bhavin Gandhi > - Bump Go compiler version to 1.13 ([#453](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/453)) -- Yuri Shkuro > > 2.19.0 (2019-09-23) > ------------------- > ... (truncated)
Commits - [`54da502`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/54da50209f6acdcb06df61e60eeda5b52a4ef47c) Prepare release 2.20 ([#466](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/466)) - [`e9ee65b`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/e9ee65be7b23cbf2ed8280766fcbb6103aa16383) Fix github.com/uber-go/atomic import ([#464](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/464)) - [`f2bdef7`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/f2bdef7faf35d024087d9225d88a202a86e21a31) Rename package experimental to x ([#462](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/462)) - [`ab94682`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/ab94682f276c8c307e7fcd3f551c48ad459eab8f) Expose Sampler on Tracer and accept sampler options via Configuration ([#460](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/460)) - [`e70c261`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/e70c2614beb08ee956129ade19238a7ac3f58720) Make delayed sampling optional ([#459](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/459)) - [`8fad375`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/8fad375dd9cbccbe91846d730f2984a765a2adcb) Do not apply adaptive sampler to child spans ([#457](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/457)) - [`790ac7d`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/790ac7d2ce523cf70275416fc2d7f5de388f9cd5) Restore linting of the main package - [`ec42c2d`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/ec42c2d3157d19a101620e9425cb7f4b99f58bb8) Refactor remote sampler for better extensibility ([#455](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/455)) - [`cd170df`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/cd170dfacc4ab7bf53c92adc0ef9fbbcac19649b) Stop using Sampler.Equal() ([#454](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/454)) - [`e158b0d`](https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger-client-go/commit/e158b0de7bae3a9063e1987381e1fd56d66391cc) [experimental] Add tag matching and priority samplers ([#452](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/issues/452)) - Additional commits viewable in [compare view](https://github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go/compare/v2.19.0...v2.20.0)

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=2.19.0+incompatible&new-version=2.20.0+incompatible)](https://dependabot.com/compatibility-score.html?dependency-name=github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=2.19.0+incompatible&new-version=2.20.0+incompatible) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot use these labels` will set the current labels as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these reviewers` will set the current reviewers as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these assignees` will set the current assignees as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use this milestone` will set the current milestone as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot badge me` will comment on this PR with code to add a "Dependabot enabled" badge to your readme Additionally, you can set the following in your Dependabot [dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com): - Update frequency (including time of day and day of week) - Pull request limits (per update run and/or open at any time) - Out-of-range updates (receive only lockfile updates, if desired) - Security updates (receive only security updates, if desired)

comments.body:
Hi @dependabot-preview[bot]. Thanks for your PR.

I'm waiting for a [containers](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) member to verify that this patch is reasonable to test. If it is, they should reply with `/ok-to-test` on its own line. Until that is done, I will not automatically test new commits in this PR, but the usual testing commands by org members will still work. Regular contributors should [join the org](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) to skip this step.

Once the patch is verified, the new status will be reflected by the `ok-to-test` label.

I understand the commands that are listed [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dependabot-preview[bot]*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
